variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14664 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14664 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14664 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P787492 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14664
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P787492 Air Filter, Primary Round is crafted to provide outstanding engine protection by filtering out dust, dirt, and debris before they reach the combustion chamber. Its round design maximizes airflow while maintaining exceptional filtration efficiency, supporting better fuel economy and engine performance. Perfect for trucks, heavy machinery, and industrial equipment, this filter is built to withstand harsh conditions. Its durable construction extends service intervals, reducing maintenance frequency and ensuring long-lasting engine health.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4714 Air, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14664
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4714 air filtration products are designed to effectively reduce the amount of damage-causing dust and dirt particles that make their way into your equipment’s engine.  Every Fleetguard product meets or surpasses the quality and performance standards required by a new engine.
